mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shops (name, folder, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{folder}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, folder, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM shops WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, folder, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM shops WHERE folder = #{folder}
SELECT id, name, folder, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM shops ORDER BY sort_order, id
